architectural_purpose: deterministic refresh diagnostics and explainability without remediation recommendation approval orchestration or execution

explicit_limitations: v4.1 Phase 8 creates deterministic diagnostics and explainability metadata only.
v4.1 Phase 8 does not enable approval or authorization.
v4.1 Phase 8 does not enable automatic correction.
v4.1 Phase 8 does not enable automatic sequencing.
v4.1 Phase 8 does not enable migration execution.
v4.1 Phase 8 does not enable mutation behavior.
v4.1 Phase 8 does not enable orchestration execution.
v4.1 Phase 8 does not enable planner integration.
v4.1 Phase 8 does not enable production consumption.
v4.1 Phase 8 does not enable recommendation ranking scoring or selection.
v4.1 Phase 8 does not enable recovery execution.
v4.1 Phase 8 does not enable refresh execution.
v4.1 Phase 8 does not enable remediation.
v4.1 Phase 8 does not enable rollback execution.
explicit_prohibitions: No explanation becomes a recommendation ranking scoring or selection system.
No recommendation ranking scoring or selection exists.
No summary implies authorization or approval.

diagnostic_summaries.summary: manifest diagnostics are aggregated as descriptive governance evidence.
dependency diagnostics are aggregated as descriptive governance evidence.
lineage diagnostics are aggregated as descriptive governance evidence.
schema diagnostics are aggregated as descriptive governance evidence.
sequencing diagnostics are aggregated as descriptive governance evidence.
drift diagnostics are aggregated as descriptive governance evidence.
replay diagnostics are aggregated as descriptive governance evidence.
rollback diagnostics are aggregated as descriptive governance evidence.
Missing diagnostic coverage is visible and not inferred.
Inconsistent diagnostic severity is visible and not normalized.
Prohibited diagnostic domain remains visible and inactive.
Blocked diagnostic state is visible and not remediated.
Stale diagnostic evidence is visible and not suppressed.
Cross-layer diagnostic conflict is visible and not resolved.

explanation_summaries.explanation: Cross-layer diagnostics summarize observed governance evidence without action.
Unsupported states remain visible and are not normalized.
Blocked states remain visible and are not remediated.
Prohibited states remain visible and inactive.
Limitations state what the diagnostics layer cannot execute or authorize.
Cross-layer summaries describe evidence relationships without recommending actions.
Provenance continuity remains descriptive and explicit.
Lineage continuity remains descriptive and explicit.
Replay continuity is explained without replay execution.
Rollback continuity is explained without rollback execution.
Missing explanation coverage is visible and not inferred.
Inconsistent explanation category is visible and not normalized.
Prohibited explanation domain remains visible and inactive.
Blocked explanation state is visible and not remediated.
Stale explanation evidence is visible and not suppressed.
Cross-layer explanation conflict is visible and not resolved.
